utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Are you serious ? !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I would love to live with you Ross . That is ... that is great ! Thank you !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I am ... I am just glad I could , you know , help you out .

emotion_cause.span: 8_I could , you know , help you out .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Wow ! I’m ... I’m so happy for you guys . This is so ... so , not stupid .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ross ... Ross , you have no idea what this means to me ! I mean , I mean I was gonna be homeless . You just saved me ! You’re my hero !

utterances.text: Hero , I uh , I do not know ... well , all right .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I have to go tell Monica what a wonderful brother she has !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You are gonna say things now , are not you ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But I should tell you this , this exact same thing happened to my roommate Denise .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: She moved in with a guy who was secretly married to her and he said he did not love her , but he really did , and it just blew up !
